commands.summary: Run the narrow QQ音乐 visible-anchor playback baseline through the bundle-backed invoke path.

validatedClaims: ASCII QQ音乐 playback is validated through OCR-anchor activation and evidence-image verification.
The anchor-based narrow skill is validated across multiple visible ASCII rows on the aa result page.
boundaryClaims: Chinese OCR anchor playback is still a candidate boundary.
This member does not prove pointer-free activation or generalized playback for arbitrary queries.

validatedClaims: The row-fallback activation path is validated on the ASCII aa result page.
The row-fallback activation path is validated on the Chinese 周杰伦 result page.
boundaryClaims: Chinese row fallback does not yet prove requested-title semantic selection.
The current Chinese validated row case verifies the observed playback title 天空仍灿烂, not the requested title 晴天.

validatedClaims: Notes marker insertion and AX text verification are validated on macOS.
boundaryClaims: This member is a native text sample, not a music-selection skill.

validatedClaims: Notes create-note step is contract-asserted at cursorDisturbance=none, pressMechanism=ax-action, performedAction=AXPress.
Notes marker insertion and AX text verification are still validated end-to-end.
This is the first narrow skill that consumes the Phase 2 cursorDisturbance contract through expect.signal_equals.
boundaryClaims: Recipe-level disturbance remains pointer because focus-body still uses debug.focusTextInput (cursor warp).
Phase 3 follow-on work item: add debug.axFocusTextInput so the whole chain can drop to keyboard-only.
This member is a native text sample, not a music-selection skill.

validatedClaims: Notes create-note step is contract-asserted at cursorDisturbance=none, pressMechanism=ax-action, performedAction=AXPress.
Notes focus-body step is contract-asserted at cursorDisturbance=none, focusMechanism=ax-attribute, setAttribute=AXFocused.
First narrow skill whose entire activation chain runs without warping the macOS cursor (recipe-level disturbance = clipboard).
Notes marker insertion and AX text verification remain validated end-to-end.
boundaryClaims: Recipe-level disturbance is clipboard because paste-note-body still uses the clipboard.
strategy.activation is ax-perform-action-clipboard-paste — the taxonomy label matches the runtime reality after Phase 3 #3 schema migration.
This member is a native text sample, not a music-selection skill.
Intended contract: run Notes v2's cursor-warp-free flow with the dual-cursor overlay enabled on every AX step.
Intended contract: create-note and focus-body assert overlayPresentation=dual-cursor-visual-only and dualCursor=true in addition to the Phase 2 cursorDisturbance contract.
Intended product role: presentation-layer member for the AUV ghost dual cursor contract on a live macOS desktop.
This member is currently a candidate presentation demo, not a validated baseline.
A hands-off replay on 2026-05-21 failed because the Notes toolbar button 新建备忘录 was present but not AX-pressable in the live app state (run_1779371986165_16879_0).
Human desktop interaction contaminates evidence for this demo; any replay where an operator switches into Notes, types, or pastes must not be promoted.
Presentation-only: the recipe does not add new validation for Notes itself; that lives in macos.notes.create_and_verify_note.v2.
Overlay visual fidelity (pixel sprite, pill color, animation) is verified by the design system layer, not by the recipe runner; the runner only checks the contract signals.
Requires a human watching the screen to deliver value.

validatedClaims: TextEdit marker insertion and AX text verification are validated on macOS.
boundaryClaims: This member is a native text sample, not a music-selection skill.

expectedSignals: The bundle lists two QQ音乐 narrow skills and two native text samples.
Member-level coverage summaries distinguish validated activation from unresolved semantic selection.
The bundle keeps QQ音乐 evidence-image playback verification, QQ音乐 AX now-playing verification, and generic AX text verification separate.
The bundle is inspectable through the CLI.
successCriteria: The bundle can be listed and shown through the CLI.
The validated sample set is preserved without rewriting target titles or broadening scope.
Phase 1 freezes the narrow-skill product slice without pretending unresolved Chinese semantic selection is solved.
nonGoals: This bundle does not claim generalized cross-app distillation.
This bundle does not claim universal AX coverage.
This bundle does not collapse native text verification into QQ音乐 playback.
This bundle does not claim Chinese requested-title semantic selection is solved for QQ音乐 row fallback.

knownLimits: This is the first bundle-shaped artifact, not the final schema.
The bundle intentionally stays shallow and app-centered.
Target application version compatibility is still unresolved.
QQ音乐 Chinese requested-title semantic selection remains unresolved in the row-fallback member and is accepted as a phase-1 freeze boundary.
